message:
feat(diagnostics): add tick stall detection and subscription tracing for bd-14ak

Add diagnostic instrumentation to help debug animation freeze bug (bd-14ak):

- subscription.rs: Add debug_trace! for reconcile start/complete with ID counts
- program.rs: Add debug_trace! for subscription reconcile stats and frame skips
- app.rs: Add tick stall detection that logs via JSONL when no ticks for 750ms
- app.rs: Optimize to only tick active screen instead of all 28 screens

Enable diagnostics with FTUI_PERF_HUD_JSONL=1 to capture tick_stall events.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>
